name: Guiguzi

skills.name: The Laws of Nature
skills.description: Slips out of vision and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Prophecy - Hidden Hand
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed boost and a disguise, reducing the Physical andMagical Defense of enemies touched and dealing damage to them.

skills.name: The Animist
skills.description: Summons sprites, and after a brief delay, pulls nearby enemies, inflicting damage and stun. When an enemy hero is hit, gains a shield and grants ashield to all nearby allies.

skills.name: Prophecy - Out of Sight
skills.description: After 1s, he grants disguise and Move Speed to himself and near by teammates. Gains vision of the nearest enemy hero. Disguise breaks upon using Basic Attacks, skills, or actions that affect enemies.

tips: Guiguzi is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.8% win rate and 0.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Glacial Buckler → Longnight Guardian → Ominous Premonition → Frigid Charge.
Run Fate for stats that match Guiguzi's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Prophecy - Hidden Hand → The Animist → Prophecy - Out of Sight → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Guiguzi excels into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Fatih, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
Guiguzi sits at Tier B globally (51.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Guiguzi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi is Tier B Support with 51.8% win rate, 0.3% pick rate, and 0.3% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Guiguzi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Ominous Premonition, Frigid Charge. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Guiguzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Fatih, Wukong, Musashi into Guiguzi. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Guiguzi completes core items. Guiguzi struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Guiguzi counter?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi is strong into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Guiguzi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Guiguzi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi sits at Tier B globally (51.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Guiguzi play?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Guiguzi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Guiguzi or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Guiguzi has +5.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Guiguzi?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.3%). Focus bans on higher-tier Support picks unless targeting a one-trick.

Guiguzi sits at Tier B globally (51.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
Matchups: strong into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong; weak into Fatih, Wukong, Musashi.
Guiguzi vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Guiguzi has +5.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Guiguzi vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Guiguzi has +1.5% WR vs Cai Yan in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.
Draft tip: counter-pick or comfort pick when lane matchup is favorable.
